creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 184205
patch

The attached patch:
* Adds options ZSTD LZMA
* Adds USES=execinfo

Tor now uses two compression libraries. They are used only for directory information traffic.

They were previously disabled in the port due to the bug in archivers/zstd which is now resolved.

Builds in poudriere.
